low.0: Zone with limited ecosystem — few walkable amenities
low.1: Consider neighboring zones with greater commercial diversity

medium.0: Moderate commercial diversity — covers the basics
medium.1: Check if present categories match your lifestyle

high.0: Robust ecosystem — high probability of finding everything on foot
high.1: Keep cost expectations aligned with this zone's quality

insufficient_data.0: Insufficient DENUE data — assessment available after next update

low.1: Consider zones with Metro or Metrobús within 1 km

medium.0: Acceptable employment access — check specific routes to your workplace
medium.1: Combine public transport with short walking legs

high.0: Job hub — wide employment offer reachable in 45 minutes
high.1: Keep cost expectations aligned with a high-access zone

insufficient_data.0: Insufficient data — refresh after next DENUE/GTFS ingest

n03.insufficient: Score available after 2 DENUE snapshots (≥3 months apart)

low.0: Stable zone — low displacement risk from price pressure

medium.0: Mild change — monitor prices and new openings every 6 months
medium.1: Zone with improvement potential without extreme inflation pressure

high.0: Rapid gentrification — evaluate buying timing before the price jump
high.1: Check cultural diversity to avoid homogenization risk

insufficient_data.0: Score available after the next DENUE snapshot (≥3 months)

low.0: Worsening trend — evaluate safety before buying
low.1: Review FGJ figures by category (violent vs property crimes)

medium.1: Monitor quarterly FGJ reports for the zone

high.1: Attractive zone for families and long-term investment

insufficient_data.0: Insufficient data — assessment available after next FGJ update

low.0: Zone vulnerable to shocks — review home insurance and contingencies
low.1: Consider zones with better transit redundancy and fewer water cuts

medium.0: Balanced resilience — no critical alerts but improvement areas exist
medium.1: Acceptable location against seismic events or sporadic cuts

high.0: High resilience — zone prepared to absorb shocks
high.1: Keep cost expectations aligned with robust infrastructure

insufficient_data.0: Insufficient data — assessment available after next ingest

low.0: No premium detected — price opportunity without educational compromise
low.1: Evaluate individual schools before ruling out the zone

medium.0: Moderate premium — market aligned with average educational quality
medium.1: Compare price/m² with adjacent zones of similar quality

high.0: Prime zone for families — expect to pay premium for school proximity
high.1: Check school availability before buying — high demand

insufficient_data.0: Insufficient data — assessment available after next SIGED/market ingest

low.0: Chronic water crisis — plan for cistern + additional tank
low.1: Factor in private water-truck costs during dry season

medium.0: Moderate water stress — check rationing schedule

high.0: Zone with water security — reliable continuous service
high.1: Keep cost expectations aligned with robust water infrastructure

insufficient_data.0: Insufficient data — assessment available after next SACMEX/CONAGUA ingest

low.0: Car-dependent zone — factor in fuel/parking costs
low.1: Consider zones with Metro or Metrobús within 500 m if you rely on public transport

medium.0: Mixed walkability — combine walking + transit for daily errands
medium.1: Check specific amenities near the address

high.0: Walkable zone — handles most errands on foot
high.1: Keep cost expectations aligned with prime walkable zone

insufficient_data.0: Insufficient data — assessment available after next DENUE/GTFS ingest

low.0: Bedroom community — limited nightlife, plan to travel to other zones
low.1: Ideal for those who prioritize quiet nights

medium.0: Balanced nightlife — restaurants and light entertainment available
medium.1: Check specific noise levels and hours near the address

high.0: Nightlife hub — wide gastronomic and cultural offering
high.1: Consider ambient noise — check acoustic reviews before buying

insufficient_data.0: Insufficient data — assessment available after next DENUE/FGJ ingest

low.0: Not senior-friendly — hospital far and demanding transit
low.1: Consider zones with 2nd-level hospital <1.5 km and metrobús nearby

medium.0: Acceptable zone — check specific accessibility of the address
medium.1: Prioritize ground floors or buildings with elevators

high.0: Ideal for seniors — health, diversity and low-effort transit
high.1: High demand from this profile — expect to pay a premium

insufficient_data.0: Insufficient data — assessment available after next ingest

n11.insufficient: Momentum available once ≥50 projects + 6 months of data are met

low.0: Zone decelerating — less favorable buying timing
low.1: Compare with neighboring zones showing accelerating momentum

medium.0: Stable zone — no immediate opportunity signals
medium.1: Monitor F08, A12 and N01 indicators in the next 3-6 months

high.0: Zone accelerating — favorable momentum to buy before the next hike

insufficient_data.0: Insufficient data — N11 requires ≥50 projects and 6 months of history

f08.insufficient: Insufficient data for quality of life

a05.muy_eficiente: Very efficient total cost vs. appreciation

a06.baja: Neighborhood not aligned with your profile

b08.insufficient: Not enough sales history for forecast

demo_banner.label: Demo

narvarte.summary: Narvarte combines accessible price, rising lifestyle and migration of young profiles from Condesa and Roma. It is an alpha-zone with score 78 and a 12-month horizon to mainstream.

pulse.headline: Narvarte is in strong momentum: demand 86, appreciation 81.

causal.evidence_metro: 2 new stations within 400 m in 2025 boosted foot traffic 22%.
causal.evidence_gastro: 34 new restaurants in 12 months, 88th percentile in density.
causal.evidence_migration: 1,050 households moved from Condesa/Roma with 12% higher average income.
causal.evidence_supply: New-build pipeline dropped 8%, pushing prices up.
causal.conclusion: The three positive forces clearly outweigh the supply-side negative; the zone should keep appreciating 6-8% over 12 months.

PreviewComprador.meta_title: DMX Preview · Find your ideal neighborhood
PreviewComprador.meta_description: See how DMX helps you pick the neighborhood that best fits you in minutes, with real per-neighborhood data.

hero.title: Find your ideal neighborhood in 3 minutes
hero.subtitle: Answer three lifestyle questions and we rank the neighborhoods that really fit you — with evidence, not luck.

lifestyle.title: 1. Your lifestyle
lifestyle.description: Three simple questions define your profile. Here is a simulation.
lifestyle.profile_summary: Young couple · $5M MXN budget · Lifestyle priority

matches.title: 2. Your personalized match
matches.description: Top 5 neighborhoods ranked by fit with your profile.

highlight.title: 3. Your featured neighborhood: Narvarte
highlight.description: A neighborhood with all 15 DMX indices in one place.

pulse.title: 4. Buy now or wait?
pulse.description: The neighborhood pulse tells you if it is a good time to jump in.

timeline.title: 5. How Narvarte has evolved (12 months)
timeline.description: Monthly trend of four key indices with highlighted milestones.

cta_final.title: Start your search with DMX
cta_final.subtitle: Create your free account and receive your real match with neighborhoods in your city.
cta_final.label: Start search

PreviewAsesor.meta_title: DMX Preview · Present the area to your client with data
PreviewAsesor.meta_description: Turn every pitch into a quantitative argument. Pitch builder, client profiles and data-backed answers.

hero.title: Present the area to your client with real data
hero.subtitle: Build your pitch in minutes: pick the client profile, see zones with quantitative fit and answer objections with evidence.

profiles.title: 1. Your fictional clients
profiles.description: Three representative profiles. Pick one to see a generated proposal.

proposal.title: 2. Generated proposal
proposal.description: Three neighborhoods with quantitative arguments, ready to share.

pitch.title: 3. Pitch builder
pitch.description: Build three visual cards with zone, scores and quantitative metrics.

pdf.title: 4. PDF preview
pdf.description: Report ready to send via WhatsApp or email.

objections.title: 5. Objections + data-backed answers
objections.description: Four common objections and how to answer them with evidence.
objections.a1: Narvarte appreciated 6.4% in 12 months and is in the 82nd percentile on price. The average ticket is still below Condesa.
objections.q2: What if there is no listing in my budget?
objections.a2: The zone has liquidity 74 and STR 74: monthly rotation is steady; average wait is under 60 days.
objections.q3: How do I know it will keep rising?
objections.a3: Momentum 81, investment 79 and YNG 88. The combo signals sustained demand from young high-capacity profiles.
objections.q4: How safe is it to live there?
objections.a4: IDS (social development) 84, 91st percentile. The zone is among the top-ranked on perceived safety and services.

methodology.title: Supporting methodology
methodology.description: The FAM score is built on transparent data from public sources.

laura.name: Laura García
laura.rationale_narvarte: Narvarte combines FAM 76 and IDS 84: schools within 1 km and direct transit downtown.
laura.rationale_del_valle: Del Valle Centro with FAM 73 and LIV 79: budget reaches 90 m² and access to six bilingual schools.
laura.rationale_iztaccihuatl: Iztaccíhuatl is a rising alpha-zone: price 20% below average and two new schools in 2025.
laura.objections: Worried about actual bilingual school supply and safety around school drop-off.

diego.name: Diego Martínez
diego.rationale_roma_norte: Roma Norte with YNG 92 and LIV 88: bars, coworkings and transit under 5 minutes away.
diego.rationale_condesa: Condesa YNG 90 and GRN 78: parks and terraces 3 min on foot, young pet-friendly community.
diego.rationale_narvarte: Narvarte YNG 88 and MOM 81 at 30% lower price per m²: alpha-zone with a better ticket.
diego.objections: Wants to ensure the zone keeps authenticity and does not go generic in 5 years.

sofia.name: Sofía Ramírez
sofia.rationale_polanco: Polanco ICO 89 and STA 86: 12 minutes to the business corridor and 24/7 services.
sofia.rationale_lomas: Lomas de Chapultepec STA 90 and GRN 82: calm, green and close to corporate clients.
sofia.rationale_santa_fe: Santa Fe ICO 84 for executives in the corporate zone: less commute if she works there.
sofia.objections: Concerned about rush-hour traffic and valet parking availability.

page.title: LifePath — Find your neighborhood
page.meta_description: A 15-question quiz to discover neighborhoods that best match your lifestyle.
page.intro: Answer 15 questions and we show you the 20 neighborhoods with the best match for how you live.
page.how_it_works_body: We cross your answers with 15 DMX indices, neighborhood Genome and real public data.
page.why_different_body: We don't show listings — we show zones that match your life. Then you decide where to buy or rent.

quiz.title: LifePath quiz
quiz.intro: Under 3 minutes. You can change answers later.
quiz.q_family_priority: How important is a family-friendly zone?
quiz.validation_error: Check your answers — some data is missing.
quiz.submit_error: We couldn't save. Please try again.

results.title: Your LifePath neighborhoods
results.meta_description: Top 20 neighborhoods with the best match for your quiz.
results.intro: Ordered from best to worst match. Explore each to see details.
results.empty_state: You haven't taken the quiz yet.
results.no_matches: Not enough data to generate matches. Try again later.
results.ghost_warning_tooltip: This neighborhood appears in top Ghost Zones — social and press buzz exceeds DMX fundamentals. Review prices vs comparables before deciding.

page.title: Climate Twin — neighborhoods with similar climate
page.meta_description: 15-year historical NOAA + CONAGUA. Find neighborhoods with similar climate patterns.
page.intro: We compare 15 years of climate data to find your climate twins.
page.empty_state: Not enough climate data for this zone.
page.empty_state_pick_zone: Pick a neighborhood to see its climate twins:

landing.title: Ghost Zones — detect over-hyped areas
landing.subtitle: Identify neighborhoods where social and press hype isn't backed by DMX fundamentals. Avoid traps and find under-valued opportunities.
landing.meta_description: Detector of over-hyped vs under-valued zones using DMX fundamentals + search and press buzz.
landing.feature_1_body: See exactly how much weight search hype, press, and the gap vs DMX fundamentals carry.
landing.feature_2_body: When noise exceeds fundamentals by 3×, we flag the zone with a warning.
landing.feature_3_body: Track how the ghost score evolved over the last year to spot transitions and early bubbles.
landing.cta_body: Full ranking and per-neighborhood history are available to Pro+ accounts. Sign up or sign in to view the data.

ranking.title: Ghost Zones ranking
ranking.meta_description: Ranking of the most over-hyped and under-valued neighborhoods with transparent breakdown and 12m timeline.
ranking.intro: Sorted by ghost score descending. Click any neighborhood to see its history.
ranking.empty_state: No data yet for this period. Check back in a few days.
ranking.auth_required_body: Create an account to access the full Ghost Zones ranking with breakdown and history.

landing.title: Zone Constellations — the graph of your neighborhoods
landing.subtitle: Explore multi-layer relations between neighborhoods: migration, climate twin, DNA genome, and pulse. Discover natural clusters and relational paths.
landing.meta_description: Interconnected graph of relations between neighborhoods: migration, climate, genome, and pulse with Louvain clusters and path finder.
landing.edge_migration_body: Real moving flows between zones (RPP deeds + stubs).
landing.edge_genoma_body: Cosine similarity on 64-dim vectors of neighborhood traits.
landing.edge_pulse_body: Pulse score proximity in the same period.
landing.contagion_body: How hype from over-hyped zones propagates to real neighboring zones.
landing.explore_body: Use /indices/constellations/:coloniaId to view the focused graph with sliders + path finder.

focus.title: Neighborhood constellation
focus.meta_description: Focused graph of multi-type relations for this neighborhood.
focus.intro: Nodes colored by Louvain cluster. Edge thickness by combined weight. Use sliders to adjust weights.
focus.no_edges: This neighborhood has no strong relations computed yet.

sliders.title: Edge weights
sliders.help: Adjust each layer's weight to see how the relation ranking changes. Client-side — no re-query.

path_finder.title: Path finder
path_finder.help: Find the shortest route between 2 neighborhoods through the graph (max 5 hops).
path_finder.result_not_found: No path found within the limit.

whatMeasures.title: What does it measure?
whatMeasures.body: How many inquiries you have unanswered right now.

whyMatters.title: Why it matters
whyMatters.body: Each unanswered inquiry is a buyer leaving for the competition.

items.1: Check your inbox at the start and end of every day.
items.3: Define templates to respond in under 5 minutes.

whatMeasures.title: What does it measure?
whatMeasures.body: How long you take to respond to a new inquiry for the first time.

whyMatters.title: Why it matters
whyMatters.body: Industry SLA is 60 minutes. Below 15 min you double conversion.

items.2: Create quick replies for common questions.

whatMeasures.title: What does it measure?
whatMeasures.body: Your average response time across the conversation.

whyMatters.title: Why it matters
whyMatters.body: Buyers read your speed as commitment. SLA 120 min.

items.1: Don't leave open threads at end of day.

whatMeasures.title: What does it measure?
whatMeasures.body: Average daily interactions with your contacts.

whyMatters.title: Why it matters
whyMatters.body: Three or more touches per contact double the visit probability.

whatMeasures.title: What does it measure?
whatMeasures.body: Average properties suggested per active search.

whyMatters.title: Why it matters
whyMatters.body: Below 10 suggestions per search points to weak inventory or filters.

whatMeasures.title: What does it measure?
whatMeasures.body: Percent of searches that lead to a scheduled visit.

whyMatters.title: Why it matters
whyMatters.body: Below 50% indicates friction in proposal or scheduling.

items.1: Offer two concrete time slots when proposing a visit.
items.2: Share location and dossier ahead of time.
items.3: Confirm the day before to reduce no-shows.

whatMeasures.title: What does it measure?
whatMeasures.body: Percent of searches with a financial proposal sent.

whyMatters.title: Why it matters
whyMatters.body: Going from visit to offer is where most deals are lost.

items.1: Close every visit with a written call-to-action.
items.2: Share a financial projection of the asset.
items.3: Pair the offer with a neighborhood story.

whatMeasures.title: What does it measure?
whatMeasures.body: Percent of your portfolio actively listed for sale.

whyMatters.title: Why it matters
whyMatters.body: Below 20% listed limits your match opportunities.

whyMatters.title: Why it matters
whyMatters.body: Three or more captures diversify your pipeline against seasonal dips.

items.1: Block one hour weekly for prospecting.
items.3: Ask for referrals from current owners.

whatMeasures.title: What does it measure?
whatMeasures.body: Comparative market analyses generated in range.

whyMatters.title: Why it matters
whyMatters.body: A solid CMA anchors the price conversation in data, not opinion.

items.1: Generate a CMA on every new capture.
items.2: Share the CMA with the owner over WhatsApp.

whatMeasures.title: What does it measure?
whatMeasures.body: New captures registered in the range.

whyMatters.title: Why it matters
whyMatters.body: Capture growth predicts the next 90 days of revenue.

items.1: Ask for referrals when closing every deal.
items.2: Stay visible in your focus zones.
items.3: Attend one owners event per month.

features.f2: Voice clone of your personal voice

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: What agents and agencies typically ask before signing up.

q1.a: Pro: 1 AI video/month with ElevenLabs voice. Foto: 50 classified photos/month with Vision AI. Agency: 20 AI videos/month + voice clone + virtual staging + 5 seats.

q2.a: Q3 2026 to the public. Founders cohort gets early access in July 2026, before the public launch.

q3.q: Do I need to be a DMX agent to use Studio?
q3.a: No. Studio is open to any real estate agent, photographer or agency in Mexico. If you already have a DMX account, it connects to your agent portal automatically.

q4.a: You record 30 seconds reading a standard script. ElevenLabs trains your personal voice and uses it to narrate all your videos automatically. Available on Agency plan.

q5.a: Yes. Immediate cancellation, no penalty or minimum term. Access continues until the end of the billed cycle.

q6.q: What about my data and my clients' data?
q6.a: LFPDPPP Mexico privacy compliance. Explicit opt-in for each image use. Data stored on DMX infrastructure with encryption at rest and per-user RLS.

q7.q: Does it work in other countries?
q7.a: H1 (2026) Mexico only. H2 expansion to Colombia, Argentina and Brazil. Infrastructure already supports multi-country, but support and catalogue activate progressively.

q8.q: Does it integrate with Inmuebles24, Lamudi or Vivanuncios?
q8.a: In Sprint 3 of the roadmap (BIBLIA v4). Auto-publishing to portals scheduled for Q4 2026 subject to API availability.

q9.q: How much does producing 1 video cost?
q9.a: AI production cost (Kling, ElevenLabs, etc.) is covered in your plan. No extras per video within your monthly quota.

q10.a: The first 50 subscribers receive 30% lifetime discount on their plan, Studio Founder badge and direct voice on the roadmap. Limited seats — once full, closed forever.
